testcase.name: @AfterClass tearDown
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchSessionException: Tried to run command without establishing a connection Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.firefox.FirefoxDriver Command: [ca5d4b8d-9b67-4b63-a667-58ec80d767e5, quit {}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: firefox, browserVersion: 152.0.6, moz:accessibilityChecks: false, moz:buildID: 20260713164047, moz:geckodriverVersion: 0.37.0, moz:headless: false, moz:platformVersion: 10.0, moz:processID: 7736, moz:profile: C:\Users\ADMIN\AppData\Loca..., moz:shutdownTimeout: 60000, moz:webdriverClick: true, moz:windowless: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10....} Session ID: ca5d4b8d-9b67-4b63-a667-58ec80d767e5 at org.openqa.selenium.remote.ErrorCodec.decode(ErrorCodec.java:169) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.codec.w3c.W3CHttpResponseCodec.decode(W3CHttpResponseCodec.java:142) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.codec.w3c.W3CHttpResponseCodec.decode(W3CHttpResponseCodec.java:49) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.HttpCommandExecutor.execute(HttpCommandExecutor.java:223) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.service.DriverCommandExecutor.invokeExecute(DriverCommandExecutor.java:216) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.service.DriverCommandExecutor.lambda$execute$0(DriverCommandExecutor.java:126) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture$AsyncSupply.run(CompletableFuture.java:1789) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1090) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:614) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1474)

testcase.name: search_component_visibility
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Browsing context has been discarded Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.firefox.FirefoxDriver Command: [ca5d4b8d-9b67-4b63-a667-58ec80d767e5, findElement {value=//div[@id='search'], using=xpath}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: firefox, browserVersion: 152.0.6, moz:accessibilityChecks: false, moz:buildID: 20260713164047, moz:geckodriverVersion: 0.37.0, moz:headless: false, moz:platformVersion: 10.0, moz:processID: 7736, moz:profile: C:\Users\ADMIN\AppData\Loca..., moz:shutdownTimeout: 60000, moz:webdriverClick: true, moz:windowless: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10....} Session ID: ca5d4b8d-9b67-4b63-a667-58ec80d767e5 at testCases.Search.TC_SF_016_SearchComponentVisibilityTest.search_component_visibility(TC_SF_016_SearchComponentVisibilityTest.java:45) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) ...
